data.name: Family Breeding
data.detailed_description:
Breeding Everyone 是一部 2D 手绘视觉小说，拥有一流的美术设计，玩家将扮演一位与四位美丽女性共同生活的年轻人。

这个家有着不同寻常的传统：按照习俗，家里的女性在成年后，会由家中的未婚男性——也就是你——完成她们的第一次怀孕。

与四个充满诱惑的女人一起生活，很难抵挡那股冲动。在 Breeding Everyone 中尽情享受冒险与快感吧！

⚠️ 游戏全英文，没有中文！
⚠️ 游戏全英文，没有中文！

data.short_description: Family Breeding is a 2D hand-drawn visual novel with beautiful artwork, where you play as a young man living with two stunning women. Your goal? Knock'em up, of course.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

data.name: Family Breeding
data.detailed_description:
Family Breeding is a 2D hand-drawn visual novel with beautiful artwork, where you play as a young man living with two stunning women.

In this place, a long-standing tradition dictates that the man in charge must ensure the women are impregnated — a role that now falls to you.

Surrounded by irresistible women and an atmosphere charged with desire, giving in feels only natural.

Family Breeding explores themes of intimacy, the risk and thrill of pregnancy, and the fulfillment of an ancient custom, with some light BDSM elements for extra spice.
